name: exploratory-testing-plugin
description: Claude Code plugin scaffold for post-implementation exploratory testing.

skills.name: setup
skills.description: Initialize config, workspace state, and progress tracking.

skills.name: pr-intake
skills.description: Ingest PR or MR metadata and changed files.

skills.name: discover-context
skills.description: Analyze code and diff context before exploration.

skills.name: map-tests
skills.description: Map related automated tests and summarize coverage.

skills.name: assess-gaps
skills.description: Identify coverage gaps and select exploratory heuristics.

skills.name: allocate
skills.description: Allocate coverage gaps to testing destinations.

skills.name: handoff
skills.description: Create QA handoff issue on GitHub.

skills.name: generate-charters
skills.description: Generate short, executable exploratory session charters.

skills.name: run-session
skills.description: Record exploratory session observations and evidence.

skills.name: triage-findings
skills.description: Classify findings into defects, spec gaps, and automation candidates.

skills.name: export-artifacts
skills.description: Export the brief, gap map, charters, and findings reports.
